docs.title: Coming Soon
docs.text:
Full documentation for the U.S. Marine Energy Resource characterization datasets is on its way.

In the meantime, you can explore the data directly:

  • Marine Energy Atlas — interactive map of U.S. marine energy resources
  • MHKDR Tidal Dataset — download tidal hindcast data
  • MHKDR Wave Dataset — download wave hindcast data

Questions? Email marineresource@nlr.gov
